IEEE DataPort Voices
Showcase Insights Moderation Editor tools Submit

Submit a reflection

Share a public testimonial or your LinkedIn post about IEEE DataPort. If you posted with #ieeedataport, include the post URL below. Submissions enter the staging pipeline and are published after editorial review.

Prefer a form? Use this page, open a GitHub submission issue, or ask your editor for a Google Form link.

Next steps

Recommended: copy the CSV row below and send it to your editor, or append it to data/linkedin-staging.csv in a pull request. Editors run python3 scripts/merge_staging.py to publish.

CSV row (staging)

  
JSON (alternative)
 
  
 
 
What happens next
 
     
  • Your row uses consent_observed=author_submitted when the consent box is checked.
    •  
  • LinkedIn URL is optional; without it the showcase shows “Curated submission” instead of “View source”.
    •  
  • The content filter may remove spam or off-topic submissions automatically.
    •  
 
 
 
Moderation fields (editor)
 
Submissions are created with these defaults:
 
     
  • consent_status: granted (if checkbox checked) or pending
    •  
  • moderation_status: pending
    •  
  • approved_by / approved_at / published_at: set by editor on approval
    •  
 
  
 
 
 

Curated member-engagement showcase. Only approved, consented content is published.

 

Data updated from data/entries.json · Hosted on GitHub Pages
